title: calea tricephala
intro: Calea tricephala, also known as three-headed milkweed, is a plant species native to Mexico and Central America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Calea tricephala include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome. Herbal preparations of Calea tricephala include teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be used to support overall well-being and promote relaxation.
